description: Style note This kurti by diva is designed to accentuate your femininity, combining traditional prints with a modern silhouette. Look stylish in this ethnic kurti and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats for an off-duty look Product detailsRed and floral printed kurti with a round neck, cap sleeves with 2 button placket, stiched detailing on the yoke and vented hemMaterial and careBlended fabricDry clean only Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing size S
